headline: Scott Galloway says he quietly spent $34,000 on Uber without realizing it — and most people are making the same mistake
summary: As a close observer of the tech industry, Galloway couldn’t believe he didn’t notice spending five figures on Uber in a single year.

raw.headline: Scott Galloway says he quietly spent $34,000 on Uber without realizing it — and most people are making the same mistake

headline: TSLA Stock Bull Run Ahead? Eric Jackson Says Signal That Preceded Tesla's Biggest Runs Has Fired Again
summary: EMJ Capital's Eric Jackson on Sunday noted that the signal that preceded Tesla's bull run of over 190% over 12 months twice has just fired again.
